word: H7160 - קָרַן - qâran - kaw-ran' - Have horns

sections.paragraph:
Original: קרן

Transliteration: qâran

Phonetic: kaw-ran'

BDB Definition:

  1. to shine
    1. (Qal) to send out rays
    2. (Hiphil) to display or grow horns, be horned

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2072

Part(s) of speech: Verb
